description: Receive Stripe webhook events (payment_intent.succeeded, charge.refunded, …) and auto-register the webhook endpoint via the Stripe API.
credentialGuide:
1. Go to your Stripe Dashboard's [API keys page](https://dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys).
2. Copy the **Secret key**. Use a test-mode key (starts with `sk_test_`) while wiring this up, then switch to the live key (`sk_live_`) once you've verified it works.
3. Paste it into the Secret Key field below.

configSchema.label: Secret Key
configSchema.helpText: Your Stripe secret key. Starts with 'sk_test_' (test mode) or 'sk_live_' (live mode). Found at dashboard.stripe.com/apikeys.

actions.description: Register a new webhook endpoint on the connected Stripe account. Called by the trigger system to auto-provision /hooks/<id>.

url.description: Public HTTPS URL Stripe will POST to

secret.description: HMAC secret echoed in Stripe-Signature header

events.description: Stripe event names to subscribe to

actions.description: Delete a webhook endpoint by its Stripe id (id from register response).
